title: Ghost Rider
description: Allows You To Become Ghost Rider
body:
Requires GeckoLib

 

This Mod allows you to become, and acquire the powers of, Ghost Rider

This is Kind of an Addon to Superhero Plus

 

Abilities:

- Summon Ghost Rider Motorcycle
  
- Chain Pull/Throw
  
- Penance Stare
  
 

You can acquire the Ghost Rider abilities by finding Lucifer who spawns at night. Right click on it and a contract will pop up; upon clicking "Sign" it will grant you the powers.

 

How to Use:

Motorcycle: Right Click to ride then go vroom.
Chain: Aiming at different angles will result in diferent things and holding down will make that thing happen for a longer time.
Penance Stare: Crouch while entity is in front of you.  
You cannot disable this power because you can't just un-sign a contract
